message:
test(oracle): add 39 conformance tests (s267-s305), 2 ignored for known gaps

Coverage: UPSERT excluded ref, DELETE with aggregate subquery, HAVING
with subquery, multiple CTEs, correlated subquery in ORDER BY, aggregate
FILTER, GROUP BY expression, TOTAL(), ZEROBLOB/QUOTE, UNICODE/CHAR,
recursive CTE fibonacci, GLOB, NTILE, FIRST/LAST/NTH_VALUE, EXISTS in
CASE, COUNT DISTINCT, CASE in aggregate, subquery FROM joined, NULLs in
ORDER BY, CROSS JOIN, date functions, VALUES clause, REPLACE function,
CUME_DIST/PERCENT_RANK, running window aggregates, INSERT OR REPLACE,
EXCEPT/INTERSECT, COALESCE/IFNULL/IIF, BEFORE UPDATE trigger, nested
subqueries, LEFT JOIN aggregate, GROUP_CONCAT, ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN,
CREATE INDEX, multi-column IN, string aggregation edges.

Ignored: s271 (subquery in JOIN ON), s291 (UPDATE...FROM with subquery).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
